name: part_006
file: tmp_【 #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D 】百鬼あやめ７周年記念ライブ  ～天女繚華～ 【百鬼あやめ⧸ホロライブ】 [uRa-uLMea7w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_006.mov

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame performs 'Maware! Setsugetsuka' with Fuwawa Abyssgard and Mococo Abyssgard.
Transition scene featuring a scenic waterfall and floating lanterns.
Nakiri Ayame performs a 3D live version of 'Yoiyoi Kokon' in a traditional Japanese setting.

subtitles.original: 花で一つ、
subtitles.english: One for the flower,

subtitles.original: 鳥で二つ、
subtitles.english: Two for the bird,

subtitles.original: 手打ち鳴らす
subtitles.english: Clapping hands

subtitles.original: 風で三つ、
subtitles.english: Three for the wind,

subtitles.original: 嗚呼、月出て四つ
subtitles.english: Ah, four for the moon rising

subtitles.original: 鳴らす鳴らす
subtitles.english: Ringing, ringing

subtitles.original: 花で一つ、
subtitles.english: One for the flower,

subtitles.original: 鳥で二つ、
subtitles.english: Two for the bird,

subtitles.original: 手打ち鳴らす
subtitles.english: Clapping hands

subtitles.original: 風で三つ、
subtitles.english: Three for the wind,

subtitles.original: 嗚呼、月出て四つ
subtitles.english: Ah, four for the moon rising

subtitles.original: 鳴らす鳴らす
subtitles.english: Ringing, ringing

subtitles.original: 今は
subtitles.english: Right now

subtitles.original: 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ
subtitles.english: Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin

subtitles.original: 華麗に花弁散らすように
subtitles.english: Like petals scattering magnificently

subtitles.original: 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ 回レ
subtitles.english: Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin

subtitles.original: 髪も振り乱して
subtitles.english: With hair disheveled too

subtitles.original: 一唱、
subtitles.english: One chant,

subtitles.original: 二唱、
subtitles.english: Two chants,

subtitles.original: 今日と、明日と、明後日と
subtitles.english: Today, tomorrow, and the day after

subtitles.original: この宴は続く
subtitles.english: This banquet continues

subtitles.original: 踊レ、歌エ、
subtitles.english: Dance, sing,

subtitles.original: 一心不乱に回レ！
subtitles.english: Spin with single-minded devotion!

subtitles.original: 今宵は何曜日？
subtitles.english: What day of the week is it tonight?

subtitles.original: 水木金？
subtitles.english: Wed, Thu, Fri?

subtitles.original: 土日月火？
subtitles.english: Sat, Sun, Mon, Tue?

subtitles.original: ハッハッハッハッハッハッハッハイヤ
subtitles.english: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha-iya

subtitles.original: ハッハッハッハッ
subtitles.english: Ha ha ha ha

subtitles.original: いよーっ！
subtitles.english: Iyo-!

subtitles.original: ぽん！
subtitles.english: Pon!

subtitles.original: らっしゃいな平は成り　時が来たざらし
subtitles.english: Welcome, peace is made, the time has come

subtitles.original: 夢うつつ夜もすがら
subtitles.english: Half-asleep, all through the night

subtitles.original: 変わりゆくことに　恐れなしのっぴき
subtitles.english: No fear of changing things, no escape

subtitles.original: ならぬのは御免
subtitles.english: I apologize for what cannot be

subtitles.original: 手毬唄歌い　君達が誘う
subtitles.english: Singing a handball song, you all invite me

subtitles.original: やな中に行き後ろ髪を引かれても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm pulled back while going into the unpleasantness

subtitles.original: 進むべきなり
subtitles.english: I must move forward

subtitles.original: 流行り廃りの　浮き世なら
subtitles.english: If it's a fleeting world of fashion and fad

subtitles.original: 嗚呼信ずる者はただ
subtitles.english: Ah, the only thing to believe in is

subtitles.original: 君だけと
subtitles.english: Just you

subtitles.original: 酔い痴れや飲み明かや
subtitles.english: Get drunk, drink the night away

subtitles.original: 案ずることなどないなこの世
subtitles.english: There's nothing to worry about in this world

subtitles.original: 人の世は恨めしい　世情はちゃらちゃら
subtitles.english: The human world is spiteful, social conditions are fickle

subtitles.original: 悲し過ごして混じりそい　それそれそれそれ
subtitles.english: Spending time in sadness, mixing in, sore sore sore sore

subtitles.original: 今を嘆いて昔を愛でても
subtitles.english: Even if you lament the present and cherish the past

subtitles.original: 君の心の内の涙川
subtitles.english: The river of tears inside your heart

subtitles.original: それじゃ適わん　何処へも
subtitles.english: That won't do, nowhere

subtitles.original: 目眩く舞台に君を連れて
subtitles.english: Taking you to the dazzling stage

subtitles.original: あまうてなどか　愛しき
subtitles.english: Something like rain? My beloved

subtitles.original: 身勝手なのが世の理か
subtitles.english: Is selfishness the way of the world?

subtitles.original: 万人待つの理想　刻まないど
subtitles.english: The ideal everyone waits for, don't carve it

subtitles.original: 刹那的なのは徒爾ら
subtitles.english: Being momentary is in vain

subtitles.original: 僕ら巡り逢うこと　まさに一期一会
subtitles.english: Our meeting is truly a once-in-a-lifetime encounter

subtitles.original: 酸いも甘いも知れん　連れ添ってこの手握って
subtitles.english: Not knowing sour or sweet, staying together, hold this hand

subtitles.original: 生き辛いとこ　浮き世から
subtitles.english: From this fleeting world, where it's hard to live

subtitles.original: 旗を掲げよ
subtitles.english: Raise the flag

subtitles.original: 宵闇が明く
subtitles.english: The twilight breaks

subtitles.original: 酔い上がりや寝れば忘らる
subtitles.english: Once the drunkenness wears off or if I sleep, I'll forget

subtitles.original: 昔も今も変わらず浮き世
subtitles.english: The fleeting world remains unchanged, past or present

subtitles.original: 人の世は愛おしい　いつだってちゃらちゃら
subtitles.english: The human world is precious, always fickle

subtitles.original: 可笑しがんで笑って愛でて　それそれそれそれ
subtitles.english: Finding it funny, laughing, and cherishing it, sore sore sore sore

subtitles.original: 暮れゆく春も凍てつく雪の日も
subtitles.english: Waning spring or freezing snowy days

subtitles.original: 日出る全ての瞬きを君と見よう
subtitles.english: Let's watch every sunrise and every blink together

subtitles.original: 彩ろ色　何処までも
subtitles.english: Colors and hues, to the ends of the earth

subtitles.original: 常ならぬ見晴らしを眺めて
subtitles.english: Gazing at an extraordinary view

subtitles.original: 開けて花一匁
subtitles.english: Open up, Hana Ichimonme

subtitles.original: 欲しがる欲しがる欲しがる声
subtitles.english: The voices wanting, wanting, wanting

subtitles.original: 勝って選んであっけないって
subtitles.english: Winning, choosing, and saying it's disappointing

subtitles.original: 猿真似の南無三　満ち足りないないない
subtitles.english: Monkey-mimicry Namusan, not satisfied at all

subtitles.original: 未だ進む道半ば
subtitles.english: Still in the middle of the journey

subtitles.original: 如何なる時も歩を前へ出せ
subtitles.english: No matter what, take a step forward

subtitles.original: 流行り廃りの　浮き世なら
subtitles.english: If it's a fleeting world of fashion and fad

subtitles.original: 嗚呼信ずる者はただ
subtitles.english: Ah, the only thing to believe in is

subtitles.original: 君だけと
subtitles.english: Just you

subtitles.english: Get drunk, drink the night away

subtitles.original: 案ずることなどないなこの世
subtitles.english: There's nothing to worry about in this world

subtitles.original: 人の世は恨めしい　世情はちゃらちゃら
subtitles.english: The human world is spiteful, social conditions are fickle
